text: I switched to a new phone and now I can’t log into my account because I don’t get the verification texts. It’s really frustrating and I need access ASAP.
I am unable to access my account despite entering the correct username and password. Please assist with this issue.
I thought my account was fine, but I can't access it now? I mean, I did change my password recently but also can't remember what I set it to. Not sure if that's the issue or something else.
I received the wrong item. Would like to return it for a refund, please.

I went and updated my account last week, but now I can't get any of the confirmation emails on my new address, which is a bit of a problem since I need to access some features. I thought it would just switch over automatically, but it seems like that's not the case at all.

I am really upset over here because I thought I was buying something that would work as said but this is just not it. I mean, how can it be that I paid good money for something that's supposed to help me and now I feel like I've just wasted it all? Not cool at all. Like, are your products even tested before sold to customers? This feels like a scam, honestly.

I was using the app for a couple of days now and it was working fine until suddenly it started crashing every time I try to open it. It’s really frustrating, like I just wanted to check my messages but now I can’t even get in. I have already uninstalled and reinstalled it twice, checked my internet connection, and even cleared the cache, but nothing seems to help. Any idea what’s going on? Also, I don’t remember if I updated it recently or not because I have automatic updates on. So, I’m not sure if that could be the cause, but it’s just not functioning at all right now.
my app crashes when i try to upload a file, can't figure out why! tried all the usual stuff but nope.
I updated my profile a while ago but now I'm not getting any notifications. Also, my friend said they sent me a message through the app, but I didn't see it. It's weird, right?
hey, i was wondering if you guys have any discounts for students? need help figuring this out.

Hello, I hope you’re doing well! I have a rather obscure question regarding the subscription services you offer. I'm curious if there's a cap on the number of simultaneous streams from my account, especially with all the different devices my family uses. Additionally, I noticed some mention on the website about compatibility with various smart TVs, but it wasn't clear if there are any specific models we should be aware of. Any clarification would be greatly appreciated!
Is there any option to upgrade my account? I think I might have missed the info.
I am quite disappointed with the service I received last week. After waiting for over an hour for support, my issue was finally addressed, but it took far too long. I expect better from your company.

I’ve been trying to access my account for several days now, but I keep getting a message saying my credentials are incorrect, even though I’m sure they are right. I’ve tried resetting my password several times, but nothing seems to work. Can you check if there’s any issue on your end with my account setup? It’s quite frustrating as I need access to complete my orders.
Hey, I was wondering if you guys will ever have like a downloadable version of the app? Or is it just online forever?

I am writing to request a refund for my recent purchase. It appears that the item was not as described, and I would like to resolve this matter at your earliest convenience. I hope you can assist me with this issue.
